wellness_tips: Drink at least 8 glasses of water a day to stay hydrated.
Aim for 7-9 hours of quality sleep each night for optimal recovery.
Take short breaks every hour to stretch and reduce sedentary strain.
Incorporate 30 minutes of moderate exercise into your daily routine.
Practice mindfulness or meditation for 10 minutes to manage stress.
Limit processed sugars and excessive caffeine intake.
Spend at least 15 minutes outdoors in natural light daily.

common_symptoms_guide.recommendation: Monitor sleep patterns and fluid intake. Consult a professional if persistent.
Rest in a dark room, hydrate, and limit screen time.
Stay hydrated, rest, and monitor temperature. Consult a doctor if over 103°F (39.4°C).
Hydrate, use a humidifier, and avoid irritants. Seek medical advice if persistent for more than 3 weeks.
Gargle with warm salt water and stay hydrated. Consult a doctor if difficulty swallowing or high fever occurs.
Establish a consistent bedtime routine, avoid screens before bed, and limit daytime naps.
